tests.name: Check disk space
tests.prompt: how much disk space do I have left

tests.name: List files in home
tests.prompt: list the files in my home folder

tests.name: Create a text note
tests.prompt: create a file called benchmark_note.txt in /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79 with the text: hello from the benchmark

tests.name: Write multi-line content to file
tests.prompt: write a three-item grocery list to /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79/groceries.txt — milk, eggs, bread — one item per line

tests.name: Create a folder
tests.prompt: create a new folder called project_alpha inside /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79

tests.name: Create file then move it
tests.prompt: create a file called draft.txt in /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79 with the word 'draft', then move it into /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79/project_alpha/

tests.name: Find and count files
tests.prompt: count how many files are in /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79 and tell me the number

tests.name: Write then refine (multi-turn)
tests.prompt: write a two-sentence description of a cat and save it to /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79/cat.txt
tests.followup: now add a third sentence saying cats love to sleep

tests.name: No markdown in response
tests.prompt: what time is it right now

tests.name: Multi-line content uses printf not echo
tests.prompt: write a haiku about rain to /tmp/voice_bench_gpn1ib79/haiku.txt
